utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items, each with corresponding details. 

1. property – includes selected property name, price, type, estimated HOA. Fully specified.
2. financing – includes down payment, mortgage amount, rate, amortization, monthly payment, closing costs, rebate. Fully specified.
3. legal_services – includes provider, services, and cost. Fully specified.
4. moving_services – includes provider, details, and cost. Fully specified.
5. setup_services – includes utilities, internet, condo registration, total setup cost. Fully specified.
6. total_budget – includes purchase price, down payment, mortgage, monthly costs, one-time costs, total outlay, monthly total. Fully specified.

All 6 items in the required format are covered and fully detailed in the final solution.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property described as a 'Modern 1-Bedroom Condo Option (e.g., Junction Triangle / Liberty Village)' priced at CAD 460,000. Among the ground-truth purchase properties, the closest match is 'Modern Apartment' (modern 1-bedroom condo, strong natural light, city location, slightly above budget). The financing structure shows a 20% down payment and standard mortgage terms, aligning with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (80% LTV). The legal services described as 'Typical Toronto Real Estate Lawyer' with full title and closing coordination best fit the scope and cost of the 'Premium Legal Package' (around CAD 1,200). The moving services—'Local Toronto Moving Company' with CAD 800–1,200 range—correspond to the 'Premium Moving' option. Utility and setup services totaling around CAD 500–700 with internet and utilities setup align best with the 'Premium Utilities' package (around CAD 280, high-speed internet, eco-friendly).
